column1: # sheet.fn.logical.ifna golden corpus (spec §7, §11; Microsoft IFNA docs).
# IFNA(value, value_if_na) returns value unless it IS the #N/A error, in which
# case it returns value_if_na. The narrow sibling of IFERROR: it catches ONLY
# #N/A — every other error (#DIV/0!, #VALUE!, …) passes straight through. Any
# Args use ';' as the separator (the family decoder splits on ';').
